Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 363 upvotes, 47 comments
  2. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 205 upvotes, 30 comments
  3. Linux Page Faults, MMAP, and userfaultfd for faster VM boots 30 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 148 upvotes, 30 comments
  5. ArXiv Declares Independence from Cornell 276 upvotes, 69 comments
  6. Full Disclosure: A Third (and Fourth) Azure Sign-In Log Bypass Found 140 upvotes, 31 comments
  7. Drawvg Filter for FFmpeg 37 upvotes, 5 comments
  8. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022) 114 upvotes, 25 comments
  9. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 203 upvotes, 60 comments
  10. Building a Reader for the Smallest Hard Drive 33 upvotes, 6 comments
  11. Cursor Composer 2 is just Kimi K2.5 with RL 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 427 upvotes, 160 comments
  13. FSFE supporters affected: Payment provider Nexi cancelled us 52 upvotes, 14 comments
  14. Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators (2011) 140 upvotes, 53 comments
  15. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 176 upvotes, 75 comments
  16. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 119 upvotes, 49 comments
  17. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 72 upvotes, 27 comments
  18. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 54 upvotes, 20 comments
  19. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 226 upvotes, 114 comments
  20. Astral to Join OpenAI 1361 upvotes, 841 comments
  21. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce 121 upvotes, 60 comments
  22. Push events into a running session with channels 334 upvotes, 189 comments
  23. FSF Threatens Anthropic over Infringed Copyright: Share Your LLMs Freel 109 upvotes, 55 comments
  24. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 258 upvotes, 147 comments
  25. How many branches can your CPU predict? 82 upvotes, 48 comments
  26. A Journey Through Infertility 33 upvotes, 22 comments
  27. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 824 upvotes, 897 comments
  28. Waymo Safety Impact 312 upvotes, 324 comments
  29. Too Much Color 7 upvotes, 3 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 372 upvotes, 645 comments

Last generated 6:00pm, 20 March 2026. Source here.
